---
name: Content update
about: Report an outdated control, incorrect mapping, or missing CVE/incident reference
title: '[UPDATE] <File> — <brief description>'
labels: content
assignees: ''
---

## File to update

**File path:**
<!-- e.g., agentic-top10/Agentic_ISO42001.md -->

**Vulnerability ID(s) affected:**
<!-- e.g., ASI03, LLM01 -->

## What is incorrect or outdated

<!-- Describe the current content and what is wrong with it -->

## What it should say

<!-- Describe the correct content, ideally with a source citation -->

## Source / evidence

**Primary source:**
<!-- Link to framework document, CVE entry, incident report, or OWASP page -->

**Date of source:**
<!-- When was this published? Is the framework version in the file still current? -->

## Severity of issue

- [ ] Critical — incorrect mapping that could lead a practitioner to the wrong control
- [ ] High — missing important control or incomplete coverage
- [ ] Medium — outdated reference, new CVE not yet cited
- [ ] Low — minor wording improvement

## Are you willing to submit a PR?

- [ ] Yes
- [ ] No — please assign to a maintainer
